# RPG Chronicler Copilot Instructions

Review the `.github/prompts` directory for specific coding guidelines and best practices to follow when contributing to this project.

After completing your code changes, follow these steps:
 1. Run `npm run fix` to automatically format your code according to the project's style guidelines. Fix any issues reported by the formatter.
 2. Run `npm run build` to ensure that the project compiles without errors. Fix any compilation issues that arise.
